title: Hamilton Beach Juicer Mixer Grinder, 1400W, 2.2 Peak HP, Stainless Steel, 13 Program Settings, Leakproof Jars, Universal Blade, Safety Features, Ideal for Indian Cooking & Blending - 58770-SAU
features: POWERHOUSE PERFORMANCE: Harness the power of our commercial-grade 1400W motor for superior blending performance that leaves no ingredient unblended. Experience durability that stands the test of time, ensuring your blender remains a trusted kitchen companion for years to come. Variable speed settings ranging from 3000 RPMs to 18000 RPMs, supported by an intelligent speed sensor for consistent results regardless of the food load.

13 PROGRAM SETTINGS: The Juicer Mixer Grinder comes with 13 programs settings. Choose from 5 grind settings: Coarse, Medium, Fine, Partial & Full Grind. Choose from 5 mix and blend settings: Dry, Wet Hard, Wet Soft, Soup and Blend. Plus the Pulse function gives you more control over your blend. Manual and pre-set selection buttons – easily select the correct function using the manual selection button and then preset your most-used function to avoid having to select it every time.

UNIVERSAL BLADE: The durable stainless steel blade handles all kinds of ingredients with ease, so you don’t have change it every time you want to juice, blend or grind a different ingredient. Effortlessly conquer any ingredient with made with thick hardened stainless steel, there’s no need to change the blade. The blades endure ice crushing for at least 4,000 cycles.

LEAKPROOF & SHATTERPROOF: Leakproof and shatterproof Tritan lids, equipped with robust sealing gaskets and locking tabs to ensure a leak-free experience across our 0.5L, 1.0L, and 1.5L jars. The jar and lid locks must stand up to a minimum 6,000 uses and the handles remain intact for at least 48,000 cycles.

SAFETY REDEFINED: Prioritise safety in the kitchen with advanced electronics and enhanced safety features, providing peace of mind while you blend. Safety comes first with our double interlocks, auto-braking system, secure jar handles, and easy-to-remove lids, providing you with peace of mind and an added layer of protection.
description: Product Description Discover Hamilton Beach! Discover America's number #1 bestselling appliance brand, Hamilton Beach which is now available in the UK. Add a touch of elegance to your culinary space with their modern, innovative designs which are built to last, meaning you can brew, toast and #cookwithconfidence for many years to come! Trust in the Innovation & Quality of Hamilton Beach! Innovation For Over 100 Years With a rich heritage spanning over a 100 years , we have established ourselves as a trusted brand known for our commitment to quality & innovation. Quality Assured Built to last with an extensive 5 year cover* for peace of mind. -*When registered online T&C's apply. America's No.1 Appliance Brand America's No.1 Appliance Brand for combined kitchen electrics and garment care* - * Source: Circana, based on brand-level unit sales, 12 months Dec 2023 Chef Approved "Powerful performance delivers professional level results at home." -Chef Radhika Howarth, founder of Radikal Kitchen Discover The Hamilton Beach Juicer Mixer Grinder Used by the Professionals! Designed to achieve ultimate results in juicing mixing and grinding various foods. Tackle challenging spices to make tasty dishes, or, create the perfect juices and more. Get inspired from the included TV chef Radhika Howarth's recipe book to help you make delicious meals for all the family! Juice! Mix! Grind! Armed with a powerful 1400W motor and precision stainless steel blades, the Hamilton Beach JMG will cut through almost anything, from cinnamon sticks to garam masala. The Juicer and mixer allows you to create delicious sauces and smoothies too, the possibilities are endless! Get Inspired! Juice, Mix & Grind like a Pro... The video showcases the product in use. Choose from 13 program settings, with infinite speed controls, intelligent sensors and Universal steel blades to easily mix and grind their way through even the toughest spices. Watch and admire! Gain culinary inspiration from the best! Used by Professional Chef Radhika Howarth! Professional TV Chef, influencer and content creator, Radhika Howarth demonstrates how to use the Hamilton Beach Juicer Mixer Grinder to grind garam masala. See how the Hamilton Beach juicer, mixer & grinder can make a difference in your kitchen and help you cook delicious meals for all the family! #cookwithconfidence The video showcases the product in use. Click to play video Play Mute Current Time  0:00 / Duration  1:06 Loaded : 9.10% 0:00 Stream Type  LIVE Seek to live, currently behind live LIVE Remaining Time  - 1:06   1x Playback Rate Chapters Chapters Descriptions descriptions off , selected Captions Captions off , selected English (Automated) Audio Track default , selected Fullscreen This is a modal window. video Merchant video How to lock the Jar & Lid onto the base Align & Lock the Jar Align the arrow on the base with the unlock icon on the jar, then twist clockwise until it clicks into place. Align the Lid Position the lid so the interlock lines up with the front of the jar. Secure the Lid Push the lid straight down onto the jar and press the lid clips to lock into place, ensuring a snug fit. Confirm Alignment Ensure all parts are securely locked - the appliance won't start until the interlock indicator stops flashing. Previous page Powerful 1400W Motor Powerfully juices, mixes and grinds through all ingredients. Leakproof Tritan Lids for added security... 13 Custom Cooking Programs... Bags of versatility in one appliance! Square Jars for even circulation... Grind with precision! effortlessly powers through every ingredient... Next page 1 Powerful Motor 2 Leakproof Design 3 Custom Cooking Options 4 Expertly Designed 5 Stainless Steel Blades How do I lock the jar onto the base correctly? Place the jar on the base, aligning the arrow on the jar with the unlock symbol on the base. Turn the jar clockwise until it clicks into place, ensuring it’s secure. How do I lock the lid in place? Position the lid so that its interlock lines up with the front of the jar. Press down firmly to ensure the lid fits snugly. The appliance will not start until the jar and lid are securely locked. How do I reset my Juicer Mixer grinder? Simply press the reset button located at the bottom of the appliance.
